name: Chess: Create AI Game

description.en: Start a chess game against the AI on MultiversX. You play as white and the AI responds as black with every move recorded on-chain.
description.de: Starte ein Schachspiel gegen die KI auf MultiversX. Du spielst als Weiß und die KI antwortet als Schwarz, jeder Zug wird On-Chain gespeichert.

bot: Creates a chess game where you (the agent) play as black. After creating the game, immediately call @chess-join with the returned GAME_ID to join as black. Then open the game for the user to make their first move.
